name: TeamPass
description: TeamPass — open source collaborative password manager with granular access controls for teams.

seo.title: TeamPass — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: TeamPass: TeamPass — open source collaborative password manager with granular access controls for teams.

when_to_use: Team password vault with folder-level RBAC for orgs
Self-hosted credential manager for air-gapped environments
Shared secret access control for IT and DevOps teams
API key and credentials rotation tracking per project
Active Directory integration for user-linked vault access

cons: UI and mobile experience lag modern tools
Security track record has had issues
review.verdict: Works if you need a free self-hosted team vault on LAMP; PassBolt or Bitwarden usually feel nicer.
review.best_for: Budget-constrained teams with LAMP hosting already in place.
review.not_for: Teams that want a modern API-first experience.

lock_in.reason: Open source self-hosted, data fully portable
